description: An analyst must create a Separation of Duties (SoD) policy in the IGA tool to prevent a single user from having two conflicting permissions (e.g., creating a vendor and approving a payment).

nodes.task_description: Identify the two conflicting permissions ('create_vendor' and 'approve_payment') that constitute a toxic combination.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst correctly identifies the permissions that violate SoD.

nodes.task_description: Create a new SoD rule in the IGA tool that flags any user who is assigned both permissions simultaneously.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully creates the preventative rule.

nodes.task_description: Run the new rule against the current user base and identify three users who are currently in violation of the new policy for remediation.

expected_outcome.value: Analyst successfully detects and reports existing policy violations.
